calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-07-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amy Harrington for Peter Cortez (Petitioner).

Ms. Harrington explained efforts made in contacting heirs (Ancestry.com; Fidelity Title Proprietary Program; online phone directories; real property search County by County, etc.).
Ms. Harrington also stated that her Client does not funds to hire a Genealogist, that she is not aware of how to search through Social Security records, that the Decedent had a reverse mortgage, that the bank is going to foreclose on the property because of the reverse mortgage and that they have no objections at this point. The Petition for Spousal Property is taken under submission.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Barrientos. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jan-18-2017 Continued To Feb-01-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Continued To Jan-18-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann, specially appearing as attorney for petitioner Glenna Wile.

The Court raised the question of efforts made to contact other prospective heirs. Mr. Vann responded that he was not aware if any such efforts were made. He said that the petitioner was not aware of any other heirs. The court indicated it needed more information on what efforts had in fact been made to learn of the existence of other heirs. The matter was continued to January 18, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not reported)
